description: Project-scoped Riela workflow to design and review the Riela memory feature implementation without committing or pushing.

prompts.rielaPromptTemplate: Run design review, implementation review, then final output. This workflow must not commit, push, or mutate unrelated files.
prompts.workerSystemPromptTemplate: Return concise JSON only. Preserve unrelated dirty worktree changes. Do not commit or push. For review nodes, inspect the current repository state and diff before answering.

steps.description: Review the memory feature design before further implementation.
Review the current memory feature implementation against the requested behavior.
Summarize the review findings and required follow-up implementation work.
